# Australian FM Penny Wong holds press conference on Australia-ROK energy security and AUKUS

## Overview
Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong conducted a press conference in Seoul addressing a joint Australia-ROK statement on energy security. Topics included AUKUS cooperation, regional security, and diplomatic efforts on the Middle East conflict.

## Details
Wong noted Australia's involvement with partners UK, France, and US to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Australia has provided defensive and diplomatic support to the region. The event aligns with ongoing ROK diplomatic navigation of Strait blockades. No specific vessel or casualty details mentioned here.

**Location**: Seoul, South Korea

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @jkgarokgov, which covers ROK government affairs, defense policy, official statements. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following ROK government affairs will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
